messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, ‘A bunch of people are standing around watching a woman cut a piece of cake and there are a bunch of coffee cups and saucers on the table.’.

1. Subject: A bunch of people
   Relation: are standing around
   Object: watching a woman cut a piece of cake
   
2. Subject: there
   Relation: are
   Object: a bunch of coffee cups and saucers 
   
3. Subject: a woman
   Relation: cut
   Object: a piece of cake
   
4. Subject: a bunch of coffee cups and saucers
   Relation: are
   Object: on the table

   Object: a snowboarder 

2. Subject: a snowboarder 
   Relation: is wearing 
   Object: a turquoise ski jacket 

3. Subject: a snowboarder 
   Relation: has 
   Object: his snowboard up in the air 

4. Subject: a snowboarder 
   Relation: jumps from 
   Object: a snowy platform
